instructions.instruction: Run `tessl skill review --optimize <skill-path>` to optimize the skill before committing
instructions.original_snippets: Run the review with optimization to improve the skill's quality score...Iterates up to 3 times, applying best-practice improvements automatically.
instructions.relevant_when: When preparing any Tessl skill for a pull request or publication

instructions.instruction: Aim for a review score of 70% or higher; re-run with --max-iterations 10 if still below threshold
instructions.original_snippets: Aim for a score of 70% or higher. If the score is still below threshold, re-run with `--max-iterations 10`.
instructions.relevant_when: When the initial optimize run does not reach the 70% threshold

instructions.instruction: Increment the version in tile.json following semantic versioning before committing
instructions.original_snippets: Open `skills/<name>/tile.json` and increment `version` following semantic versioning
instructions.relevant_when: Any time a skill is being prepared for a new publish

instructions.instruction: Use patch bump (x.y.Z) for bug fixes or minor wording improvements
instructions.original_snippets: Bug fix or minor wording improvement | `0.1.0` → `0.1.1`
instructions.relevant_when: When changes are small fixes or wording tweaks

instructions.instruction: Use minor bump (x.Y.0) for new capabilities that are backward-compatible
instructions.relevant_when: When new steps or features are added to the skill

instructions.instruction: Use major bump (X.0.0) for breaking changes to skill behavior
instructions.relevant_when: When the skill workflow changes in a way incompatible with previous usage

instructions.instruction: Run `tessl skill lint <skill-path>` to validate after making changes
instructions.original_snippets: Confirm the output shows the tile as valid before committing.
instructions.relevant_when: After optimizing and bumping the version, before committing

instructions.instruction: If lint fails, fix the issues and re-run lint until it passes before proceeding
instructions.original_snippets: If lint fails: review the reported errors, fix the issues in `SKILL.md` or `tile.json`, then re-run `tessl skill lint` until it passes before proceeding.
instructions.relevant_when: When tessl skill lint reports errors

instructions.instruction: Stage both SKILL.md and tile.json when committing
instructions.original_snippets: Stage all changes to `SKILL.md` and `tile.json`, commit, and open a pull request against `main`.
instructions.relevant_when: When creating the commit to open a PR
